title: Positioning fixture to a rubber chain retreading press
abstract: The formed fixture to a rubber chain retreading press includes a steel chassis (2) on which running ways (4) for moving a tensioning car (5) are mounted, wherein two gear racks (3), part of the drive of the tensioning car (5), are mounted on the steel chassis (2) parallel to the running ways (4). On the tensioning car (5) is mounted a tensioning drum (1) mounted on a shaft (24) bearing by bearing bodies on a stationary stand (7) and an hinged stand (9). The tensioning drum (1) is capable of being tilted by means of a hydraulic cylinder (22), and at each end of the tensioning drum (1) it is possible to mount movable separable stops (21 and 31), and in the middle of the tensioning drum (1) a power belt (27) is fixed, with towing ropes (28) attached and clamps (29) clamped thereto. On either side of the press body beams (14) are located to which lower fixed roller ways (10) and upper movable roller ways (6) are mounted by means of braces.
claims: Claims 1. A positioning fixture for a rubber chain retreading press, characterized in that it includes a steel chassis (2) on which running ways (4) are mounted for moving a tensioning car (5), wherein on the steel chassis (2), parallel to the running ways (4), are mounted two gear racks (3) forming part of the drive of the tensioning car (5), which drive is also provided by two hydraulic motors (20) via gears (19), and the movement of the tensioning car (5) is effected by means of running wheels (18) fixed thereto, whereby a tensioning drum (1) mounted on a shaft (24) is established on the tensioning car (5), bearing by means of bearing bodies on a stationary stand (7) and an hinged stand (9), which tension drum (1) is tiltable by means of a hydraulic cylinder (22), whereby the tension drum (1) is driven by a hydraulic motor (8) and a second gear (25), meshed with another gear (23) mounted on the tension drum (1), whereby at each end of the tension drum (1) the possibility is provided to mount movable separable stops (21 and 31 ) to limit the lateral displacement of the rubber chains, and in the middle of the tensioning drum (1) a power belt (27) is attached by means of a plate (26), to which pulling ropes (28) and clamps (29) are attached, whereby, for the removal and subsequent movement of the rubber chain, two beams (14) are established on either side of the press body, to which a right-hand plate (16) and a left-hand plate (17) are fitted, and on the underside of the press a lower plate (15) is mounted, the right (16), left (17) and lower (15) plates being the base for mounting lower fixed roller ways (10), and a short guide (13.1) and a long guide (13.2) being mounted on the right plate (16) and left plate (17), guiding the movement of upper movable roller ways (6), divided into segments moving in the vertical direction by another hydraulic cylinder (12), the housing of the upper movable roller ways (6) being made of a half-pipe with cut-outs for the passage of the other hydraulic cylinders (12), to which half-pipe two sectors are welded to allow the mounting of rollers (30). 2. A positioning fixture for a rubber chain retreading press, according to claim 1, characterized in that a special slide (11) is mounted between the lower die of the press and the rubber chain.
